name: Scrambled Tofu with Mushrooms and Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a skillet with your preferred cooking spray.
2. Sauté the onion until it becomes translucent.
3. Add the sliced mushrooms and red pepper to the skillet, and continue sautéing until they are tender.
4. Stir in the sea salt and turmeric, then add the soft tofu.
5. Mash the tofu around gently to create a texture similar to scrambled eggs.
6. Continue sautéing for 5-8 minutes, adding the turmeric as it cooks to achieve the desired yellow color of scrambled eggs.
And I am sure that there is no reader on this list who will be surprised to learn that I consider this recipe to be deficient in one of the major and most important food groups: garlic. I added 4 or 5 minced cloves of garlic, sautéed with the other ingredients.
I also added black pepper, oregano, and any herbs I felt like using at the moment. Feel free to experiment with different flavors.
From the Frozen Assets List by frozen-assets@xc.org
